---
name: catalog-maintenance
description: Maintains generated/manual/localized catalogs, system symbols, reason codes and catalog compatibility.
---

# Catalog Maintenance

## Use when
Use for system catalogs, official symbols, reason codes, localization or catalog query behavior.

## Workflow
1. Identify owner layer: generated/manual/localized/rules.
2. Preserve stable IDs/domains/kinds/namespaces.
3. Add provenance/source.
4. Validate catalog consumers.
5. Document compatibility impact.

## Output
- Findings or changes required
- Tests/docs affected
- Validation commands/results
- Remaining risks or unknowns
